stemHtml: Refer to figure or E(LO)6 chart from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. What is the best route for an aircraft flying from VALENCIA (VLC) VOR/DME (39° 29'N, 000° 29'W) to ALMERIA (AMR) VOR/DME (36° 49'N, 002° 15'W) with the LE(R)-63 not activated?

options.c: VLC - B28 - R47- BLN - M192 - AMR
options.d: VLC - A34 - ALT - W810 - VSJ - W820 - AMR
